# Engine AI

> Engine AI Consulting Limited is a New Zealand-based AI consultancy that helps businesses discover, build, and deploy AI agents for real operational problems. Founded by Ben du Chateau and Joe Ward — two enterprise technology veterans with 40+ combined years in NZ/AU tech and 2,000+ hours of hands-on AI development.

Engine AI operates on an Agent-as-a-Service (AaaS) model using Sprint Build Cards for scoped engagements. We are not the Shenzhen robotics company (EngineAI Robotics / engineai.com.cn), nor the London capital markets firm (engineai.com). We are a New Zealand consultancy focused on practical AI adoption for NZ businesses.

## Key Services

- **AI Discovery:** Structured assessments identifying where AI creates measurable value
- **AI Agent Development:** Building production AI agents deployed in client systems using Sprint Build Cards
- **Claude for Teams (Co-Work, Chat, Code):** Deploying Anthropic's Claude across organisations with Claude Co-Work for autonomous task completion, Claude Chat for daily use, Claude Code for developers, plus custom skills and shared workspaces
- **Microsoft Copilot and Copilot Studio:** Deploying M365 Copilot and building custom Copilot Studio agents with proper configuration, security, and team training
- **OpenClaw AI Orchestration:** Open-source AI operating system for self-hosted agent deployment, management, and orchestration on client infrastructure
- **Bespoke Builds:** Custom dashboards, internal tools, data pipelines, and workflow automations — fixed scope, fixed price via Sprint Build Cards

## Products We Deploy

- **Claude Co-Work** — Anthropic's agentic AI for autonomous task completion in shared workspaces
- **Claude Chat** — Daily AI companion for research, document analysis, writing, and brainstorming
- **Claude Code** — AI coding tool that reads codebases, writes production code, runs tests, and commits changes
- **Microsoft Copilot** — AI inside Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint within M365
- **Copilot Studio** — Custom AI agent builder within the Microsoft ecosystem
- **OpenClaw** — Open-source AI orchestration OS with single gateway for all AI agents

Target clients: NZ mid-market businesses (20-500 staff) in professional services, trades, logistics, and field/back-office operations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://engineai.co.nz): Main site — our approach, who we serve, how we work
- [Claude for Teams](https://engineai.co.nz/claude): Claude Co-Work, Chat, and Code deployment services
- [Microsoft Copilot](https://engineai.co.nz/copilot): M365 Copilot deployment and Copilot Studio agent development
- [OpenClaw](https://engineai.co.nz/openclaw): Open-source AI orchestration platform for self-hosted agent management
- [Bespoke Builds](https://engineai.co.nz/builds): Custom dashboards, internal tools, and workflow automations
